scope: Applied to the active CurseForge Xaero minimap profile and existing Xaero waypoint files by scripts/sync-active-client-files.ps1.
player_goal: Keep the current/recent death marker visible, but stop old death markers from filling the whole screen after repeated deaths.

implemented_behavior.reason_for_fallback: Xaero's exposed profile config has a global waypoint_max_distance only. Setting it to 100 would also hide the recent death marker, so the safer config-only implementation keeps deathpoints enabled and disables old deathpoints.

future_option.needed_for_exact_100m_behavior: A client-side Xaero integration or custom HUD hook that can compare old deathpoint distance to the player at render time while leaving the recent deathpoint exempt.
future_option.not_implemented_now: No new mods or custom client HUD hooks were added for this pass.
